description:
This node provides Twitch chat message information from a TwitchInterface. 

Note that all outputs are generated on a new Twitch chat message, and will not display any information when connected to a display node.

fields.OnMessage: Fires on receiving a new Twitch chat message.
fields.Message: Outputs the contents of the message as a text string.
fields.UserId: Outputs the Twitch Channel ID of the message sender.
fields.DisplayName: Outputs the Twitch username of the message sender.
fields.Color: Outputs the Twitch chat color of the message sender.
fields.IsHighlighted: Shows if the chat message is highlighted.
fields.IsSubscriber: Shows if the chat message sender is subscribed to the Twitch channel.
fields.IsModerator: Shows if the chat message sender is a moderator of the Twitch channel.
fields.IsBroadcaster: Shows if the chat message sender is from the Twitch channel, or broadcaster.
fields.IsTurbo: Shows if the chat message sender is subscribed to Twitch Turbo.
fields.IsVIP: Shows if the chat message sender is a VIP in the Twitch channel.
fields.CheerBadge: Shows the current cheer chat badge of the chat message sender.
fields.CheerAmount: Shows the cheer amount if the chat message includes any bits.
fields.Bits: Shows the bit amount if the chat message includes any.
fields.BitsDollars: Shows the bit amount in USD (United States Dollars), as a double value.
fields.SubscribedMonthCount: Shows the amount of months the chat message sender is subscribed to the channel.
fields.CustomRewardId:
If the chat message was sent with a custom reward redeem, shows the ID of the custom reward.
This will only output the custom reward ID if the redeem has the "Require Viewer to Enter Text" option enabled.
